title: hydrolea zeylanica
intro: Hydrolea zeylanica, also known as the water-leaved hydrolea, is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of hydrolea zeylanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of hydrolea zeylanica typically involve drying the leaves and stems to be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
